regions.title_ownership: Product label only: use type-label (or type-caption) for the app name; do not use type-title here. Single H1 / type-title owner is surface-main-column.page_header.

regions.notes: Desktop/tablet persistent rail; mobile converts to drawer (see responsiveness).

subsections: inline_error_slot (main landmark, below toolbar when fetch fails)

grid.desktop: CSS grid: sidebar fixed 264px column + minmax(0,1fr) main; main uses space-6 outer padding per design_system surface-main-column.
grid.tablet: Optional 264px sidebar or overlay drawer per nav_model; main min width 320px for readable column.
grid.mobile: Single column; sidebar hidden by default; main full width with space-4 horizontal inset (token space-4 per design_system gutters).

max_width.dashboard_content: Fluid inside main; cap dense KPI text blocks to ~1040px inner max when stats row spans full main width.

layout_transforms.mobile: Stack: header → hamburger + drawer nav → main column. Toolbar: button-primary full width above a single-row horizontal scroll of chip-filters OR filter menu button opening sheet (prefer sheet if >4 chips). KPI strip: 1 column cards.
layout_transforms.tablet: Optional persistent 264px sidebar OR icon rail + drawer for overflow; main retains min 320px. Toolbar: button-primary auto width, first in visual/DOM order, then chip row with wrap. KPI: 2-column grid.
layout_transforms.desktop: Persistent nav-sidebar 264px + main. Toolbar: primary CTA left, filters to the right with wrap at space-5 gap. KPI: up to 4 columns within max width policy.

nav_model.mobile: drawer + contextual actions in header (menu button opens nav with focus trap; Esc closes; return focus to launcher)
nav_model.tablet: rail (icon-only 72px) optional with tooltips OR persistent 264px sidebar if EM prefers density; no duplicate top+bottom primary nav
nav_model.desktop: persistent left rail (264px) per design_system nav-sidebar

button-primary.mobile: behavior: reflow — width 100% in toolbar stack; min-height 44px touch target (use md size)
button-primary.tablet_desktop: behavior: reflow — auto width, min width 120px, align start

chip-filter.mobile: behavior: scroll or sheet — avoid multi-row chip wall; prefer filter sheet if more than 4 options
chip-filter.tablet_desktop: behavior: reflow — horizontal cluster with space-2 gap between chips

card-task-row.all: behavior: reflow — internal subgrid: status column fixed 40px + minmax(0,1fr) title + meta column min 96px; quick_actions icon buttons 44x44 min on mobile

components.notes: Presents nav-sidebar content when open; scrim bg-app @ 60% opacity using existing tokens only if implemented as token alias in theme (else use documented rgba in theme module).

active_state_cues: Non-hue-only: on active, add 2px inner border using border-subtle and optional leading check glyph (decorative with aria-hidden + aria-pressed on control)
type-label weight 500 → 600 when active (still within type-label scale)

layout_rules.internal_columns: Grid: [status 40px] [title minmax(0,1fr)] [meta min 96px] [actions auto]; gap space-3; align center vertical

layout_rules.shimmer: optional low-contrast pulse using bg-subtle ↔ bg-elevated (no layout shift)

content.title: type-title
content.secondary_link_optional: type-label underlined using accent-primary text color only (not a second primary button)

actions: Retry triggers refetch of task list

hover.button-primary: Background accent-primary-hover; cursor pointer; no motion-only cues.
hover.card-task-row: Border or background one step toward bg-subtle from bg-elevated; maintain readable text contrast.
hover.chip-filter: Neutral: slightly brighter bg-subtle border with border-subtle 1px; Active: keep non-hue cues per component.active_state_cues.

focus-visible.global: All interactive elements use shadow-focus-ring; never remove outline without replacement.
focus-visible.card-task-row: If row is interactive, show focus ring on row container; if only inner buttons, ring on control.

loading.task_list_region: Replace card list with list-loading-skeleton; toolbar remains interactive; button-primary loading variant shows inline spinner and aria-busy.

empty.task_list_region: Show empty-task-list; primary CTA duplicates New task path from toolbar.

error.task_list_region: Show inline-error-panel above list area; preserve main landmark.

mobile.nav: drawer; menu in header; focus trap documented in notes_for_implementation
mobile.toolbar: CTA full width then filters sheet or horizontal scroll

tablet.toolbar: CTA first left, filters wrap with space-3

desktop.toolbar: CTA left, filters right in single row when space allows

contrast: Body and title text on bg-app / bg-elevated: meet WCAG 2.1 AA for normal text using fg-default / fg-muted as defined in design_system.json (provisional hex until stitch.approved_baseline).
Primary button label on accent-primary: meet AA for text (token pairing already stated in design_system button-primary).
Semantic fills (success/warning/error) used as non-text indicators must pair with text label in badge-status; do not rely on color alone for chip active state.
keyboard: Logical tab order: skip link (optional) → header actions → main h1 → toolbar (CTA before chips) → list → pagination if present.
Drawer: open/close via button; Esc closes; focus moves to drawer on open and returns to launcher on close.
chip-filter: role togglebutton or button with aria-pressed; Space/Enter toggles.
list: Arrow key navigation optional P1; minimum is roving tabindex on rows OR focusable actions per row.
error panel: focus move to role=alert container on error appearance (document in implementation).
screen_reader: One type-title visible as main page heading; header product label is type-label.
Loading: aria-live=polite on region when transitioning to skeleton; busy on primary fetch button when scoped to create action.

responsive_acceptance: At viewport width 360px: no horizontal scroll for primary main content; task row text truncates with ellipsis per content_rules; CTA remains fully visible without requiring horizontal scroll in toolbar stack.
At 768px: main content column width ≥ 320px when sidebar/rail visible; nav does not duplicate as both bottom bar and full sidebar simultaneously.
At 1280px: dashboard shows persistent 264px sidebar + main; toolbar shows primary CTA before filter chips in reading order.
Nav drawer: opening does not reduce main width below 0 when closed; when open, scrim blocks interaction with main.
KPI strip column counts match layout.kpi-strip.layout_rules.columns per breakpoint.

changelog.detail: Documented mobile drawer nav, tablet rail/sidebar options, main min width 320px tablet / desktop policies and component_resize for nav-sidebar.
Added list-loading-skeleton, empty-task-list, inline-error-panel organisms and state_specs for loading/empty/error.
Assigned single type-title owner to main page_header; header product label demoted to type-label in layout.regions and accessibility.screen_reader.
toolbar-cluster enforces DOM/visual order: button-primary before chip-filter-group; mobile stack CTA first.
card-task-row internal_columns grid defines fixed status and meta columns vs title fr.
Added kpi-strip organism with tokenized typography and responsive columns.
chip-filter active_state_cues: border + optional check + weight bump; aria-pressed documented.

notes_for_implementation: Theme: map all color/space/radius/shadow strings from design_system.json to styled-components DefaultTheme; no ad-hoc hex in atoms. Compose page from organisms in order: shell-app-header, nav (sidebar or drawer wrapper), surface-main-column containing page-header-title, optional kpi-strip, toolbar-cluster (button-primary + chips), then task list or skeleton/empty/error. Breakpoints: implement three bands consistent with this spec (767/768 and 1279/1280 boundaries). SSR: preserve landmark structure in server output. Testing: each visible state (default, loading, empty, error) must expose stable data-testid or accessible name for QA selectors per testing-and-qa-standards when frontend task wires E2E.
